description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on every pull request, push, and published release. The workflow has two jobs: build and test. The build job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a centos:7 container, installing dependencies, building and testing ninja in debug and release modes, and uploading the release asset. The test job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with an ubuntu:20.04 container, installing dependencies, configuring and building ninja with GCC and Clang, and running unit tests and Python tests.
